scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @invoice/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @invoice/api" "npm run dev --workspace @invoice/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @invoice/shared && npm run build --workspace @invoice/api && npm run build --workspace @invoice/web
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build --workspace @invoice/shared && npm run build --workspace @invoice/web
